# Dhiaan Dave — Portfolio

Personal portfolio and project hub for Dhiaan Dave: student, builder, Cove Hacks (Lead of Logistics & Ops), Telos Tutoring (Co-Founder).

## Quick links

- [Homepage](https://dhiaandave.vercel.app/)
- [Blog](https://dhiaandave.vercel.app/blog.html)
- [Projects](https://dhiaandave.vercel.app/projects.html)
- [URL Browser](https://dhiaandave.vercel.app/search.html)

## LLM Extras

- [WebMCP tool schemas — contact form](https://dhiaandave.vercel.app/): form with `toolname="sendContactMessage"` on / and /contact, accepts name, email, message, POSTs to Formspree.
